use_cases: Displaying structured content in dark-themed interfaces and dashboards
Creating consistent card layouts with headers, titles, and descriptions
Building card-based UI layouts for various content types
Serving as a foundational component for more complex card compositions
ai_summary: A dark-themed card component system featuring multiple sub-components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) designed for creating structured content containers in dark mode interfaces. Built with React forward refs and Tailwind utility classes, it provides a clean, flat visual style suitable for SaaS dashboards, fintech applications, and developer tools.
